industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: SDIC Power Holdings CO., LTD.
summary: SDIC Power Holdings CO., LTD. engages in the electricity business in China. It generates electricity with an installed capacity of 16.72 million kilowatts of hydropower; 11.765 million kilowatts of thermal power; and 808,500 kilowatts of wind and photovoltaic power. The company is based in Beijing, China.
